---
name: Docs / project-shape issue
about: Report unclear docs, misleading wording, missing setup steps, or confusion about repo boundaries
title: '[docs] '
labels: ['documentation']
assignees: []
---

## What is unclear or missing?

Describe what confused you.

## Which document(s) are involved?

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `docs/BUILD_AND_USAGE.md`
- [ ] `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `docs/SECURITY.md`
- [ ] `docs/OPEN_SOURCE_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md`
- [ ] `docs/REPO_SHAPE.md`
- [ ] other

## What did you expect to find?

What information or explanation were you looking for?

## Suggested improvement

If you already know the better wording, section, or missing command, put it here.

## Reader context

Which best matches you?

- [ ] First-time GitHub visitor
- [ ] Contributor trying to build locally
- [ ] Maintainer preparing an open-source release
- [ ] Someone debugging runtime behavior

## Extra context

Screenshots, copied command output, or links to the exact section are welcome.
